reason: Defines current InstallationPlan edge contracts for single, multi, flow, post, and dependency semantics.
Defines one-way config-to-plan-to-generator data flow and required checks for generated script behavior.

Captures existing menu, dependency, post, hidden, and endFlow patterns used by one-click script flows.
